query:
SELECT 
  oi.id,
  oi.productName,
  oi.quantity,
  oi.grossWeight,
  oi.netWeight,
  oi.cbm,
  oi.variantId,
  pb.grossWeight as batch_grossWeight,
  pb.netWeight as batch_netWeight,
  pb.cbm as batch_cbm
FROM order_items oi
LEFT JOIN package_boxes pb ON oi.variantId = pb.variantId
WHERE oi.orderId = (SELECT MAX(id) FROM orders)
LIMIT 5;
